title: MQTT Message Envelope
description: Common envelope carried by every MQTT telemetry message (RFC-007 §3). Message schemas compose this via allOf and add their message-specific fields, then close the object with `unevaluatedProperties: false`. This schema intentionally leaves `additionalProperties`/`unevaluatedProperties` unset so it annotates only its own four fields — setting `additionalProperties: true` here would mark every property as evaluated and defeat the composing schema's `unevaluatedProperties: false`. Identity fields are redundant with the topic so an ingested row stands alone.

schema_version.description: Major version of the message schema. Additive, backward-compatible changes do not bump it; breaking changes do (RFC-007 §5).

greenhouse_id.description: Stable lowercase kebab slug, unique site-wide (e.g. gh-a, lettuce-north). Same identity used in topics, REST paths, and DB rows.

zone_id.description: Lowercase kebab slug, unique within a greenhouse (e.g. zone-1). Present for zone-scoped messages; null for greenhouse-scoped messages.

ts.description: Reading/event timestamp. RFC 3339 / ISO 8601, UTC, millisecond precision (e.g. 2026-06-07T14:03:00.000Z).
